concept: Mask the active cytotoxin as a carbamate/glycosyl prodrug that requires stepwise enzymatic conversion, where the final activating enzyme is over-expressed in tumor tissue.
mechanism: A tumor-over-expressed enzyme (e.g. thymidine phosphorylase) catalyzes the final activation step preferentially in tumor tissue, sparing normal cells.

citation.label: Shimma N, Umeda I, Arasaki M, et al. The design and synthesis of a new tumor-selective fluoropyrimidine carbamate, capecitabine. Bioorg Med Chem. 2000;8(7):1697-706.
citation.note: First author verified as Shimma N via NCBI (the Claude Science draft mislabeled it 'Miwa').
